diff:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yml b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index 42e9815..fe3ffe3 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -34,6 +34,9 @@ jobs:
     - name: Build and Test
       run: ./Build.ps1
       shell: pwsh
+    - name: Verify code style
+      run: dotnet format --verify-no-changes
+      shell: pwsh
     - name: Get package version
       id: version
diff --git a/Directory.Build.props b/Directory.Build.props
index 52b5e0c..bfd6380 100644
--- a/Directory.Build.props
+++ b/Directory.Build.props
@@ -3,8 +3,9 @@
     <IsMac>...</IsMac>
     <IsWindows>...</IsWindows>
 
-    <LangVersion>13.0</LangVersion>
+    <LangVersion>preview</LangVersion>
     <NoWarn>$(NoWarn);CS1701;CS1702;CS1591;NU1900</NoWarn>
     <TreatWarningsAsErrors>true</TreatWarningsAsErrors>
+    <EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>true</EnforceCodeStyleInBuild>
   </PropertyGroup>
 </Project>
diff --git a/NuGet.Config b/NuGet.Config
index 3f0e003..4d00e7d 100644
--- a/NuGet.Config
+++ b/NuGet.Config
@@ -2,5 +2,6 @@
 <configuration>
   <packageSources>
     <add key="nuget.org" value="https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json" protocolVersion="3" />
+    <add key="dotnet-experimental" value="https://pkgs.dev.azure.com/dnceng/public/_packaging/dotnet-experimental/nuget/v3/index.json" protocolVersion="3" />
   </packageSources>
 </configuration>
diff --git a/src/MediatR/MediatR.csproj b/src/MediatR/MediatR.csproj
index 439dfd2..bd12c7f 100644
--- a/src/MediatR/MediatR.csproj
+++ b/src/MediatR/MediatR.csproj
@@ -30,11 +30,11 @@
   <Target Name="EmbedBuildDate" BeforeTargets="CoreCompile">
-    <Exec Command="git log -1 --format=%25cI" ConsoleToMSBuild="true" IgnoreExitCode="true">
+    <Exec Command="git log -1 --format=%25cI" ConsoleToMSBuild="true" IgnoreExitCode="true" ContinueOnError="ErrorAndContinue">
       <Output TaskParameter="ConsoleOutput" PropertyName="BuildDateUtc" />
     </Exec>
     <PropertyGroup>
-      <BuildDateUtc Condition="'$(BuildDateUtc)' == ''">$([System.DateTime]::UtcNow.ToString("O"))</BuildDateUtc>
+      <BuildDateUtc Condition="'$(BuildDateUtc)' == '' Or !$([System.String]::Copy('$(BuildDateUtc)').StartsWith('20'))">$([System.DateTime]::UtcNow.ToString("O"))</BuildDateUtc>
     </PropertyGroup>

exploration_log.aha_moment: Four separate changes in four separate files, each independent. The EmbedBuildDate fix adds ContinueOnError and validates the output starts with '20' (a year prefix) to detect non-date git output from shallow clones.
exploration_log.hindsight: All four changes are mechanical and the task description was prescriptive. No deep investigation needed.

alternatives: Check if git command succeeds via condition
Use Property function to parse date
key_decisions.decision: Add ContinueOnError and validate output with StartsWith('20') check
key_decisions.reasoning: With filter:tree:0, git might return garbled output rather than failing entirely. Checking for date format prefix is a lightweight guard without requiring MSBuild property functions that may not be available in all SDK versions.

search_sequence.reasoning: Task says to fix this target
search_sequence.result: Found existing fallback that handles empty output but not garbled non-date output from shallow clones

search_sequence.reasoning: Task says to update LangVersion and add EnforceCodeStyleInBuild
Task says to add dotnet-experimental feed
Task says to add dotnet format --verify-no-changes step
search_sequence.result: Found Build and Test step as insertion point

solve_notes: Made four changes across four files: (1) added `ContinueOnError="ErrorAndContinue"` to the git Exec task and extended the fallback condition to detect non-date output (via `StartsWith('20')`) in `MediatR.csproj`; (2) changed `LangVersion` to `preview` and added `EnforceCodeStyleInBuild` to `Directory.Build.props`; (3) added the `dotnet-experimental` NuGet feed to `NuGet.Config`; (4) added a `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` step to `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
task_text:
Update MediatR.csproj packaging and Directory.Build.props build configuration

`MediatR.csproj` embeds the build date via a custom MSBuild target
that shells out to `git log`, but this fails in CI environments where
the git history is shallow-cloned with `filter: tree:0`. Fix the
`EmbedBuildDate` target to handle missing git gracefully by falling
back to `$([System.DateTime]::UtcNow)`. Also update
`Directory.Build.props` to set `LangVersion` to `preview` for all
projects, add `EnforceCodeStyleInBuild` set to `true`, and update
`NuGet.Config` to add the `dotnet-experimental` feed for preview SDK
packages. Update `.github/workflows/ci.yml` to add a `dotnet format
--verify-no-changes` step that enforces code style consistency.

test_selection.coverage_skip_reason: Auditor could not generate baseline coverage — see auditor report

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers all five edited definitions across four files. No thrash-preventing defs are needed — all changes are standalone configuration edits with no dependencies between them. An AI agent reading the four changed files upfront has everything needed without additional context.
